baseline.method: SPURS (ADMM with G0 sparsity penalty, DCT-based Poisson solver, 15 iterations)

nrmse_definition: NRMSE is computed after subtracting the global median offset (spurs - snaphu) from the reconstruction, then normalised by the dynamic range of the SNAPHU reference: NRMSE = RMSE(spurs_aligned, snaphu) / (max(snaphu) - min(snaphu)). The offset correction is necessary because phase unwrapping is only defined up to a global additive constant.
